blocks.text: Derby Sunday: Tyne-Wear Passion, Then El Derbi Decides La Liga

Sunday delivers back-to-back derbies across two leagues — Newcastle vs Sunderland at St. James' Park, then Atlético vs Real Madrid at the Bernabéu with La Liga title stakes. A full day for football purists.
⛳ Valspar Championship — Hovland & Reitan chase the field; Sungjae Im leads at -9 heading into the final round. Norwegian glory on the line.
